title: niphobolus subfurfuraceus
intro: Niphobolus subfurfuraceus, also known as Nephrolepis subfurfuracea, is a species of fern in the family Nephrolepidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Niphobolus subfurfuraceus include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
